title: Plasmid Miniprep with ethanol precipitation
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3f55b","text":"Northeastern's method for plasmid extraction and purification. From Thermo Scientific's GeneJET Plasmid Miniprep Kit","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5unqa","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dfo6","text":"Added one 96% EtOH precipitation step from https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0160509","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":43,"length":73}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"0011CBDD9B1A11EF954B0A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0160509"}}}}
steps: Pellet culture in a 1.8mL centrifuge tube at 8,000rpm for 1 minute. Decant Media
Add 250uL of Resuspension Solution and vortex
Add 250uL of lysis solution and invert 4-6 times
Add 350uL of Neutralization Solution and invert the tube 4-6 times
Bind the DNA to the column by decanting
Wash the column with 500uL of wash solution and centrifuge for 1 minute 00:01:00
Discard the flow-thru and centrifuge for 1 minute 00:01:00
Elute the purified DNA with 50uL of Elution Buffer. Let incubate for two minutes, then centrifuge for 2 minutes. Collect the flow-thru in a new centrifuge tube 00:01:00
creator: Matthew Akamatsu
